variants: Selina Dastagir is an accomplished professional, currently employed at Lilac Compass Design, where she applies her knowledge from Clovehaven Institute. She communicates effectively in the Georgian alphabet, integrating this skill into her design practices. In addition to her career in design, Selina holds the position of Juniper Cove Resilience Director, playing a key role in local community initiatives. Her literary work has been recognized through publications at Hazel Mosaic House, illustrating her depth of thought and creativity. Selina’s commitment to both her professional endeavors and civic engagement reflects her dedication to making a meaningful impact.
